calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report
Off Calendar Feb-03-2026 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Nov-04-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Aug-05-2025 Continued To Nov-04-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gilbert Jay appeared via zoom for Alan Jung (petitioner).

Mt. Jay stated that the estate has no assets, that he checked with the Franchise Tax Board and with Health Care Services, that there were no outstanding bills, and that need more time to complete the final distribution. The matter is continued to November 4, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-02-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated August 4, 2016, is admitted to probate. Alan Jung and Sandra J. Wong are appointed as Co-Executors of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for August 5, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.
